title: Narrow Passage Simulation
description: This simulation demonstrates RNCOA working effectively by navigating through a narrow passage, controlled via NMPC controller. Using a substantially reduced prediction horizon of 0.25 seconds. The boundary configuration is 'B' from fig. 2

views.name: Front View
views.description: Bird's eye view of the quadrotor's trajectory

views.name: Top View
views.description: Top view of the quadrotor's trajectory
